ai_role: Semiconductor wafers, silicon materials, and upstream semiconductor inputs
tvs_tiebreaker: Upstream materials chokepoint can complement TVS even if growth is more cyclical than software or accelerator leaders.
technical_timing_rule: Technical and cycle timing should guide adds.
rationale: Shin-Etsu is an upstream semiconductor materials leader with important wafer and materials exposure. It is a quieter AI supply-chain beneficiary rather than a direct accelerator platform.
